sanskrit:
द्यूतं चलयतामस्मि तेजस्तेजस्विनामहम्।
जयोऽस्मि व्यवसायोऽस्मि सत्त्वं सत्त्ववतामहम्॥
transliteration: dyūtaṃ chalayatāmasmi tejas tejasvinām aham | jayo’smi vyavasāyo’smi sattvaṃ sattvavatām aham ||
literal_meaning: Of cheats I am gambling; of the splendid I am splendor; I am victory, I am enterprise, I am the strength of the strong.
contextual_meaning: Krishna names the apex expressions of human traits—both luminous and shadow—declaring that even the impulse to gamble or deceive is ultimately a distorted spark of the same cosmic intelligence. Nothing is outside the sacred field; every energy can be re-owned and re-directed.
psychological_state: Post-peak-integration: the calm after realizing that even one's darkest drives are part of the same divine spectrum, removing split between 'spiritual' and 'worldly' selves.
trigger_scenario: A star athlete catches herself cheating in training, feels disgust, then recalls the verse and re-frames the urge as raw energy that can be channeled into clean excellence.
anchor_text: Every impulse, even the darkest, carries a spark of divine intelligence waiting to be reclaimed.
